subcodes.first_line: Khalil Pasha, the Governor of Beirut, dispatched 'Abdu'r-Rahman al-Hut to 'Akka as his deputy [3.5s]... ...Upon their arrival, the Commission of Inquiry invited me to meet with them but I declined. They sent a certain official by the name of Hikmat Big
subcodes.first_line_orig: خلیل پاشا والی بیروت عبدالرحمن الحوت را بوکالت از خود بعکا فرستاد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha
